summary: Comprehensive testing of Markuply visual markup and review app completed. All backend APIs (27/27 tests passed) and frontend UI flows are working correctly. Core features tested: user authentication, project creation, on-demand screenshot capture, pin-based commenting, pin status management (resolve/reopen), show/hide resolved pins toggle, search and sort functionality.

issues: Shows error icon (X) because Cloudflare blocks Playwright - expected behavior for protected sites

passed_tests: User login rejection with invalid credentials
Frontend: Pin creation by clicking on screenshot
critical_code_review_comments: React useEffect dependency warnings in ProjectCanvas.js, Dashboard.js, AdminPanel.js, SuperAdmin.js - not critical but should be addressed for code quality

The /api/comments endpoint (without attachment) doesn't properly handle authentication - it expects current_user but doesn't use Depends(get_current_user). Frontend correctly uses /api/comments/with-attachment instead.
seed_data_creation: Created test project 'Test Project from Playwright' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features are working. Test user exists with email test@example.com/test123. There are 3 projects in the system: Example Website (with screenshot and pins), Brandlume Test (blocked by Cloudflare), and Test Project from Playwright (newly created). Pin #1 on Example Website is resolved, Pin #2 is open. The /api/comments endpoint has a minor issue with authentication handling but /api/comments/with-attachment works correctly.

features_verified.pin_creation: Working - click on image creates pin at correct position
features_verified.pin_positioning: Working - pins are relative to image and scroll with page
features_verified.adding_comments: Working - comments saved and displayed in sidebar
features_verified.search_sort: Working - search and sort controls visible and functional
